description: Light/dark theme toggle, persistence, and system preference fallback.

workflows.name: Toggle between light and dark themes
steps: Note the current theme (check data-theme attribute on <html>).
Click the theme toggle button (bottom-right corner).
Verify data-theme switches to the opposite value.
Verify the background color changes visibly.

workflows.name: Theme preference persists across reload
steps: Set the theme to 'dark' via the toggle.
Verify the page loads in dark mode (no flash of wrong theme).
Verify localStorage contains the 'gaddr:theme' key with value 'dark'.

workflows.name: System preference is used when no stored preference
steps: Verify the page renders in dark mode.

workflows.name: No flash of unstyled/wrong theme on load
steps: Verify the initial paint is dark (no brief white flash).
This requires the theme script to run before body renders.
